rubric_focus: Only dialogue-confirmation commitments — things the speaker did not volunteer in prepared remarks but committed to after an analyst pushed for them through follow-up questions.

action_items.task: Follow up offline with Connor on the monthly breakdown of rent collected from defaulted tenants.
action_items.evidence_quote: We can go into the detail offline, but it was roughly $4.5 million that we collected from the defaulted tenants during the quarter.
dialogue_chain: Connor Mitchell: And then any rents as well, I think for some of these, you may receive January payments, but not February or March?
Ben Regin: In terms of what we actually collected?
Connor Mitchell: Yes. Just thinking about a modeling perspective going forward, what won't be being received for a quarterly standpoint or even monthly?
Ben Regin: Yes. We can go into the detail offline, but it was roughly $4.5 million that we collected from the defaulted tenants during the quarter.

non_commitments.text: Paul Smithers' 'we'll provide updates as we progress' on PharmaCann/4Front recovery.
non_commitments.why_not: Paul stated this unilaterally in his prepared remarks, not in response to an analyst's pushback. Not a dialogue-confirmation commitment.

non_commitments.text: Alan Gold 'hopefully... in the next short three to six month period of time, we can to announce some new investments.'
non_commitments.why_not: Hedged with 'hopefully' and 'can'. Same shape as Priya's 'I might mock something up just for fun, no promises' — explicit non-promise.
Forward outlook ('within a short 18 to 36 month period of time, the ship will generally be righted'); no actionable deliverable or owner-bound deadline.

non_commitments.text: Continued pursuit of legal remedies / receiverships against defaulted tenants.
non_commitments.why_not: Already in motion before the call (default notices issued in March; Stone Blossom already appointed receiver of Gold Flora). Mgmt described an existing process rather than committing to a new action.

non_commitments.text: Pending rent commencement on three leased properties awaiting regulatory approval.
non_commitments.why_not: Ben Regin called this 'pretty standard across markets and across industries' — normal-course, no commitment to specific action or date.
